# Copilot Instructions

These instructions apply to all AI-assisted contributions in this repository.

## Structure rules

- Do **NOT** create Python code inside `/modules`.
- Always keep Markdown content in **Spanish**.
- Use Python **only** inside `/scripts`.
- Do **not** modify `/docs` manually — it is generated by `scripts/docs/build_docs.py`.
- Follow the existing directory structure strictly.

## Content rules

- All educational content must be written in clear, accessible Spanish.
- Use a responsible, empathetic tone when discussing mental health topics.
- Do not include medical advice; always recommend consulting a professional.

## Code rules

- Python scripts must live in `/scripts` and follow the existing module layout.
- Reuse helpers from `scripts/utils/common.py` when possible.
- New modules must include at least a `README.md`.
